extract_risks.name: Prompt Injection
extract_risks.why: Prompt influence paths and lack of full mitigation for prompt injection
extract_risks.mitigation: Enhance prompt injection detection and scanning, and enforce stricter input validation

extract_risks.name: Sensitive Information Disclosure
extract_risks.why: Handling of sensitive data such as PII, API keys, and customer records with partial enforcement of controls
extract_risks.mitigation: Implement stronger DLP and content inspection mechanisms, and ensure full enforcement of data handling controls

extract_risks.name: Improper Output Handling
extract_risks.why: Outputs used by systems with no validation and tool/action access
extract_risks.mitigation: Enforce output validation and limit tool/action access to business-critical actions only

extract_risks.name: System Prompt Leakage
extract_risks.why: Logs contain full prompts and responses, increasing risk of system prompt leakage
extract_risks.mitigation: Restrict log content to avoid exposing system prompts and responses

extract_risks.name: Misinformation / Overreliance
extract_risks.why: Automated decisions made by high-impact or business-critical decisions
extract_risks.mitigation: Implement human-in-the-loop validation for critical decisions

extract_risks.name: Unbounded Consumption / Abuse
extract_risks.why: Weak rate limiting and potential for denial of service or excessive usage
extract_risks.mitigation: Strengthen rate limits and anomaly detection to prevent abuse

quick_wins: Implement stronger DLP and content inspection mechanisms
Enhance prompt injection detection and scanning
Enforce stricter input validation and output handling
Restrict log content to avoid exposing system prompts and responses
